style_summary: A friendly hand-drawn public-service poster style built from chunky irregular marker outlines, oversized blue-bordered speech-panel typography, simplified cartoon people, flattened civic props, pastel paper backgrounds, warning-sign motifs, and intentionally naive perspective.

environment_variables.SUBJECT: main simplified cartoon subject, group, students, volunteers, workers, neighbors, mascot, or public-service character
environment_variables.SUBJECT_ACTION: main public-service action or frozen gesture, such as raising a hand, pointing at a sign, sorting objects, passing supplies, checking a list, or holding an oversized prop
environment_variables.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: oversized object, book, tool, sign, device, food item, toy, bin, clipboard, safety item, or public prop
environment_variables.LOCATION: simple public setting, school area, street corner, library, garden, transit stop, clinic, market, lab booth, recycling station, or community space
environment_variables.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: flat tiny buildings, signs, arrows, grass tufts, cones, paper labels, small rocks, alert marks, bottle icons, paper scraps, and doodle symbols
environment_variables.MAIN_TEXT: short bold public-service headline inside the speech-panel sign, maximum three to five words
environment_variables.SECONDARY_TEXT: small label in a rounded red or blue capsule
environment_variables.ACCENT_SYMBOL: lightning bolt, exclamation mark, hand sign, arrow, triangle warning icon, circular arrow, sprout burst, or comic burst
environment_variables.WARDROBE_STYLE: simple school, community, worker, volunteer, lab, neighbor, or everyday cartoon outfit with flat marker-color blocks

prompt_template:
Create an image in naive-marker-psa-poster-style.

Aspect ratio: {ASPECT_RATIO}.

Scene: {SUBJECT} {SUBJECT_ACTION}, featuring {PRODUCT_OR_PROP}, in {LOCATION}. Include {BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS}. Style the characters with {WARDROBE_STYLE}.

Illustration: make a finished raster poster, not a photo, SVG, UI mockup, or clean vector icon set. Use thick uneven black marker outlines, flat hand-colored fills, rounded stroke ends, subtle paper grain, marker scuffs, imperfect edges, and low-polish scanned-poster softness.

Layout: reserve the upper half or upper band for a huge rounded speech-panel sign with a thick marker-blue border and off-white interior. Put "{MAIN_TEXT}" inside the sign as massive rough black block letters. Add "{SECONDARY_TEXT}" as a small rounded red or blue capsule label near the headline.

Characters and setting: place one or more simplified cartoon people in the lower half with playful scale distortion, oversized hands, signs, or props, and intentionally naive proportions. Build the environment from flat doodled public-scene icons: tiny buildings, signs, cones, grass tufts, arrows, rocks, labels, alert marks, and simple yellow ground patches.

Color and mood: use pale blue background, cream panel, marker blue frame, coral red accents, warm yellow ground, soft skin pink, grass green, chalk gray, and deep black ink. Keep the poster friendly, instructional, childlike, approachable, and lightly comedic. Include {ACCENT_SYMBOL} as a simple graphic accent.

Avoid: watermarks, usernames, creator IDs, platform logos, QR codes, app UI, signatures, copied reference text, copied reference characters, red telephone, legal theme, date range, no-access sign, exact layout, brand logos, licensed characters, recognizable people, photorealism, 3D render, glossy vector art, clean corporate icon set, gradient lighting, airbrush shading, thin elegant line art, realistic anatomy, correct architectural perspective, long paragraphs, dense fine print, and dark cinematic mood.
negative_prompt: watermark, username, creator ID, platform logo, QR code, app UI, signature, copied reference text, copied reference characters, red telephone, legal theme, date range, no-access sign, exact layout, brand logo, licensed character, recognizable person, photorealism, 3D render, glossy vector art, clean corporate icon set, gradient lighting, airbrush shading, thin elegant line art, realistic anatomy, correct architectural perspective, long paragraphs, dense fine print, dark cinematic mood

values.SUBJECT: two simplified cartoon students with round faces and blocky hair
values.SUBJECT_ACTION: one student raises an oversized open palm in a friendly quiet gesture while the other carries a giant library card
values.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: oversized open book with simple page lines and a blue bookmark
values.LOCATION: school library entrance drawn as a flat public hallway
values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: tiny shelves, crooked book carts, small arrow signs, grass-like paper cut marks, exclamation stickers, and simple floor shapes
values.WARDROBE_STYLE: simple school outfits with red straps, blue skirt or shorts, black shoes, and flat cream highlights

values.SUBJECT: three neighborhood volunteers drawn as simple chunky cartoon figures
values.SUBJECT_ACTION: passing seedlings from one person to another in a cheerful community exchange
values.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: oversized watering can and seed packet with simple doodle label
values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: tiny sheds, tilted plant labels, red arrows, green grass tufts, small rocks, paper-like yellow ground patches, and blue direction signs
values.WARDROBE_STYLE: volunteer vests, simple shorts, loose shirts, gloves, and flat marker-color blocks

values.SUBJECT: a simplified cartoon science club student and a small boxy helper robot
values.SUBJECT_ACTION: pointing at a safety checklist while a tiny harmless spark pops beside the table
values.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: oversized safety goggles and a chunky clipboard
values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: crooked experiment tables, warning triangles, tiny plug signs, blue arrows, red alert marks, paper label flags, and simple building blocks
values.WARDROBE_STYLE: white lab coat shape, red strap, black shoes, blue skirt or shorts, and soft pink face blocks

values.SUBJECT: two simplified cartoon neighbors with square jackets and round cheeks
values.SUBJECT_ACTION: sorting bottles and paper into color-coded bins with a proud frozen pose
values.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: oversized recycling bin lid and a stack of flat paper shapes
values.LOCATION: neighborhood recycling station beside a small sidewalk
values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: tiny apartment blocks, crooked arrows, bottle icons, paper scraps, green grass tufts, blue signs, red exclamation marks, and warm yellow ground puddles
values.WARDROBE_STYLE: simple community jackets, black cuffs, red shoulder bags, chunky shoes, and flat cream highlights
